1473fe081aae.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
1473fe081aae.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
1473fe081aae.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

5e69453a6f61.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
5e69453a6f61.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

374d196a0399.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
374d196a0399.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
374d196a0399.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

7e37c919d6dc.title: Protect the 4.7/5 rating — it took years to build
7e37c919d6dc.description: With 215 reviews at 4.7/5, your discovery advantage is substantial. Protect it by responding to every review within 48 hours and prompting satisfied tables for feedback.
